scenes.description: Introduction to the village and Whiskers' home
scenes.prompt: Animated scene: camera pans over rolling hills, showing a small village in the distance; Whiskers is seen pacing around her garden, looking out at the gate with a hint of longing
scenes.narration: In a small village nestled between rolling hills, a curious cat named Whiskers lived.

scenes.description: Whiskers discovers the hidden gate and enters the magical garden
scenes.prompt: Animated scene: Whiskers pushes through ivy vines that part with particle effects, butterflies scatter, light beams break through as the gate opens; camera pans across the magical garden, showing flowers of every color, crystal-clear streams, and a gentle breeze
scenes.narration: One morning, Whiskers discovered a hidden gate covered in ivy. Her whiskers twitched with excitement.

scenes.description: The ancient tree speaks to Whiskers and explains the garden's magic
scenes.prompt: Animated scene: camera zooms in on the ancient tree with silver bark as it speaks; particles swirl around, highlighting the magical energy of the garden
scenes.narration: In the center of the garden stood an ancient tree with silver bark. As Whiskers approached, the tree spoke in a warm, gentle voice.

scenes.description: Whiskers considers her one wish and decides on selflessness
scenes.prompt: Animated scene: camera shows a split-screen of Whiskers' thoughts, with options for endless fish, flying, or never having to take a bath again; she chooses the option 'to share this magic with my friends back home'
scenes.narration: Whiskers thought carefully. She could wish for endless fish, or the ability to fly, or to never have to take a bath again.

scenes.description: The tree gives Whiskers a glowing seed and explains its purpose
scenes.prompt: Animated scene: camera shows the ancient tree giving Whiskers a glowing seed; particles swirl around, highlighting the magical energy of the seed
scenes.narration: The tree gave Whiskers a glowing seed. 'Plant this in your garden,' it said.

scenes.description: Whiskers returns home and plants the seed, which grows into a gateway for others to find
scenes.prompt: Cinematic wide shot of Whiskers' garden with a small sapling growing from the glowing seed; camera zooms in on the sapling as it grows into a gateway with silver bark
scenes.narration: Whiskers returned home and planted the seed. Soon, a small sapling grew with the same silver bark.
